title: Aureline devcontainer-profile, declared-base-image, declared-feature, lifecycle-hook, and compose-topology record
description: Boundary schema for the devcontainer_profile_record frozen in docs/runtime/container_devcontainer_contract.md. The record is the cross-surface projection every devcontainer-aware surface (devcontainer 'reopen in container' lane, devcontainer manifest reader, prebuild warm-start backend, support / export reader, hosted-review reader, automation run review, AI tool review surface) emits when it needs one stable answer to four questions: what declared base-image source (Dockerfile in workspace, image ref pinned to digest, image ref pinned to tag, compose service image, AI-proposed pending review) backs the profile, what declared features and lifecycle hooks the profile asks the engine to apply, what workspace-mount declaration and declared-port-forward count the profile makes, and what known unsupported directives or trust postures the profile carries before a container_session_record is provisioned against it. The record does not replace the container_session_record (engine reachability, attach posture, mount admissibility live there) or the environment_capsule_record (toolchain identity, secret-projection markers live there); it is the profile-binding the session record cites through devcontainer_profile_record_ref. This schema re-exports identity_mode and workspace_trust_state_class from the identity family without redefinition. Raw devcontainer.json bodies, raw Dockerfile bodies, raw compose YAML bodies, raw image digests outside opaque image-handle classes, raw repository / registry URLs, raw absolute filesystem paths, raw OAuth / registry / SSH tokens, raw TLS material, raw lifecycle-hook command lines, and raw author identity strings never cross this boundary; opaque profile / image / feature / hook / volume / service / secret-broker / approval-ticket / policy-bundle / policy-epoch handles and class labels do. Adding a new devcontainer_profile_class, declared_base_image_source_class, declared_feature_class, lifecycle_hook_class, declared_compose_topology_class, declared_remote_user_class, declared_image_freshness_class, workspace_mount_declaration_class, declared_capability_class, declared_unsupported_directive_class, or declared_egress_posture_class value is additive-minor and bumps devcontainer_profile_schema_version; repurposing an existing field is breaking and requires a new decision row.

devcontainer_profile_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this devcontainer-profile contract. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields and additive enum values do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log, export, or persist. Raw devcontainer.json bodies, raw Dockerfile bodies, raw compose YAML bodies, raw image digests outside the typed image-handle class, raw absolute paths, and raw author identity strings never appear here.

short_summary.description: Reviewer-facing sentence safe to render in profile chrome and export review. Raw image digests, raw repository / registry URLs, raw absolute paths, raw devcontainer.json bodies, raw lifecycle-hook command lines, and raw secret values never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp captured from a monotonic clock source at profile assembly.

identity_mode.description: Re-export of the identity-mode vocabulary from schemas/runtime/execution_context.schema.json.

workspace_trust_state_class.description: Re-export of the workspace-trust state vocabulary.

devcontainer_profile_class.description: Closed devcontainer-profile class. user_authored_local_profile is the default for an individual workspace; workspace_shared_committed_profile is committed and shared. managed_workspace_provisioned_profile is provisioned by managed-workspace policy. imported_from_export_bundle_profile and captured_from_handoff_profile preserve the captured profile from an export / handoff. ai_tool_proposed_profile_pending_review forbids leaving pending review state.

declared_base_image_source_class.description: Closed declared-base-image source vocabulary. image_ref_pinned_to_digest is the only source that admits silent reuse without freshness chips; image_ref_pinned_to_tag_user_review_required surfaces a freshness chip; ai_proposed_image_pending_user_review forbids the profile from leaving pending review state.

declared_image_freshness_class.description: Closed declared-image freshness vocabulary the profile reader projects.

image_handle_ref.description: Opaque image-handle id naming the declared base image. Raw image digests, raw image tags, and raw repository / registry URLs never appear here.

dockerfile_handle_ref.description: Opaque Dockerfile-handle id when declared_base_image_source_class is dockerfile_in_workspace. Raw absolute paths and raw Dockerfile bodies never appear here.

compose_service_handle_ref.description: Opaque compose-service-handle id when declared_base_image_source_class is compose_service_image.

declared_feature_class.description: Closed declared-feature vocabulary. *_user_review_required classes surface a chip when the profile is admitted for the first time; ai_proposed_feature_pending_user_review forbids the profile from leaving pending review state.

feature_handle_ref.description: Opaque feature-handle id (feature-id-class). Raw feature URLs, raw feature versions, and raw OCI references never appear here.

lifecycle_hook_class.description: Closed lifecycle-hook vocabulary mirroring the standard devcontainer lifecycle. ai_proposed_lifecycle_hook_pending_user_review forbids the profile from leaving pending review state. initialize_command_runs_on_host is special-cased: it runs on the host rather than the container, and the schema requires it to cite a non-null hook_capability_class.

hook_handle_ref.description: Opaque hook-handle id (hook-id-class). Raw command lines, raw shell scripts, raw stdout / stderr, and raw error strings never appear here.

declared_compose_topology_class.description: Closed compose-topology vocabulary. compose_with_overrides_user_review_required and compose_with_remote_extends_user_review_required surface a chip and require user admit before provisioning.

declared_service_role_class.description: Mirrors service_role_class on schemas/runtime/container_session.schema.json. The profile's declared roles inform the multi-service topology the session record materialises.

compose_file_handle_ref.description: Opaque compose-file-handle id. Raw absolute paths and raw compose YAML bodies never appear here.

declared_remote_user_class.description: Closed declared-remote-user vocabulary. root_user_user_review_required surfaces a chip; ai_proposed_remote_user_pending_user_review forbids the profile from leaving pending review state.

workspace_mount_declaration_class.description: Closed workspace-mount declaration vocabulary. workspace_mount_omitted_user_review_required and workspace_mount_unknown_requires_review surface a chip and force inspect-only fallback at session-provisioning time.

declared_capability_class.description: Closed declared-capability vocabulary. privileged_full_capabilities_blocked_pending_admin_admit forces the session record into a blocked / external-handoff class through the no_hidden_privileged_shell rule.

declared_unsupported_directive_class.description: Closed declared-unsupported-directive vocabulary. The profile lists every directive it asks the engine to apply that the contract has flagged as 'admin-admit required' or 'review required' so a reviewer reads the request before a container_session_record provisions against it.

declared_egress_posture_class.description: Closed declared-egress-posture vocabulary. The profile names the egress shape it asks the session to honor; *_user_review_required classes surface a chip on first admit.

profile_handle_ref.description: Opaque profile-handle id (profile-id-class). Raw absolute paths to devcontainer.json, raw devcontainer.json bodies, and raw author identity strings never appear here.

environment_capsule_ref.description: Reference to the environment-capsule body whose toolchain identity, secret-projection markers, and export path govern sessions provisioned against this profile.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Optional approval-ticket ref required when an unsupported directive or privilege-elevation request was approved (reuses the integration approval-ticket family).

allOf.description: ai_tool_proposed_profile_pending_review forbids the profile's declared_base_image_source_class from leaving the AI-proposed lane and forbids any lifecycle hook from leaving ai_proposed_lifecycle_hook_pending_user_review.

managed_workspace_provisioned_profile resolves declared_base_image_source_class to managed_workspace_image_pinned_by_admin or image_ref_pinned_to_digest and resolves workspace_trust_state_class to workspace_trust_managed_locked.
declared_base_image_source_class = dockerfile_in_workspace requires a non-null dockerfile_handle_ref and resolves declared_image_freshness_class to not_applicable_built_from_dockerfile.
declared_base_image_source_class = compose_service_image requires a non-null compose_service_handle_ref and resolves declared_image_freshness_class to not_applicable_compose_per_service.
declared_base_image_source_class = image_ref_pinned_to_digest resolves declared_image_freshness_class to declared_pinned_to_digest_admissible.
declared_compose_topology_class = single_service_no_compose forbids any declared_compose_services entries.

declared_compose_topology_class in {compose_with_services, compose_with_overrides_user_review_required, compose_with_remote_extends_user_review_required} requires a non-null compose_file_handle_ref and a non-empty declared_compose_services list.
Every initialize_command_runs_on_host hook MUST cite a non-null hook_capability_class so a reviewer can see what the host-side hook is allowed to do.
ai_proposed_lifecycle_hook_pending_user_review hooks are admissible only on ai_tool_proposed_profile_pending_review profiles.

declared_capability_class = privileged_full_capabilities_blocked_pending_admin_admit requires the profile to declare host_filesystem_bind_mount_outside_workspace / engine_socket_mount_inside_container / privileged_full_capabilities_request as a declared_unsupported_directive and to forbid leaving workspace_trust_managed_locked.

devcontainer_profile_record.description: One inspectable devcontainer profile emitted by the devcontainer 'reopen in container' lane, devcontainer manifest reader, prebuild warm-start backend, support / export reader, hosted-review reader, automation run review, or AI tool review surface.
